title: HyperQuIm: Hyperspectral Quantum Imaging with Undetected Photons
summary: HyperQuIm pioneers compact quantum hyperspectral imaging by using visible-light detection to reveal infrared molecular signatures, combining IUP, adaptive optics, wavefront shaping, and AI to enable robust real-world sensing across healthcare, industry, environment, and defense.
funding_agency: FCT: Fundação para a Ciência e a Tecnologia
